messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0066",
  "title": "《阴阳师》基础数据",
  "page_index": 27,
  "page_range": "27-28"
}

Section text:
《阴阳师》基础数据
来源：点点数据自主研究及绘制
和风美学构建了独一无二的视觉符号 九年的内容焕新使IP生命力历久弥新
2025年《阴阳师》国服收入规模与活跃用户数据表现
0.0
0.2
0.4
0.6
1月2月3月4月5月6月7月8月9月10月
AppStore月流水（亿元）
ASO关键词覆盖
阴阳师
2025Q1-Q3用户留存
平均次留：
平均月留：
约22.1%
约4.8%
式神
痒痒鼠
日和风
晴明
onmyoji
0
30
60
90
1月
2月
3月
4月
5月
6月
7月
8月
9月
10月
iOS月活跃用户数（万人）
男生占比：
约74.8%
游戏凭借唯美和风打造了极强的视听辨识度，其美术与音乐质量在长期运营中保持了高水准，并形成了独特的文化符号。核心的回合制战斗与御魂搭配系统，经过近九年的沉淀，
具有丰富的策略深度。此外，游戏也积累了如秘闻副本、为崽而战、超鬼王等大量经典玩法模式。对于免费玩家和月卡党，游戏通过持续的活动和福利，提供了相对良性的资源循
环，支持长线养成。但部分月度活动被玩家认为存在模板化倾向，创新玩法的频率和力度有待提升，玩家在游戏后期容易感到内容重复。御魂的强化随机性（俗称“强歪”）是长
期存在的痛点。并且随着式神数量和系统复杂度的累积，新玩家的“入坑”门槛偏高。
© 2025 DianDian.All Rights Reserved.
27

message.content:
This section provides foundational operational data and analytical insights for the mobile game 《阴阳师》(Onmyoji), structured to support retrieval across the following dimensions:

- **Topics & Entities:** 《阴阳师》game IP, DianDian Data (research source), core mechanics (turn-based combat, 御魂/Soul matching system), classic modes (秘闻副本, 为崽而战, 超鬼王), player segments (F2P, monthly card users, new players).
- **Dates & Timeframes:** 2025 (Jan–Oct monthly tracking), 2025 Q1–Q3 (retention measurement window), 9 years (cumulative IP operation history).
- **Metrics & Figures:** App Store monthly revenue (亿元, Jan–Oct 2025), iOS monthly active users (万人, Jan–Oct 2025), Q1–Q3 average next-day retention (~22.1%), average monthly retention (~4.8%), male player demographic share (~74.8%).
- **ASO Keywords:** 阴阳师, 式神, 痒痒鼠, 日和风, 晴明, onmyoji.
- **Claims & Operational Analysis:** 
  • *Strengths:* 和风 (Japanese-style) aesthetics and audio maintain high quality and unique cultural recognition; long-term iteration yields deep strategic gameplay; continuous events provide a sustainable resource cycle for non-paying/low-spending players.
  • *Pain Points:* RNG in Soul enhancement ("强歪"); templated monthly events with low innovation frequency; late-game content repetition; high onboarding barrier for new players due to accumulated character/system complexity.
- **Evidence Types:** Time-series charts (revenue, MAU), statistical retention/demographic metrics, ASO keyword coverage lists, qualitative operational assessment.
- **Key Retrieval Questions Answered:** What are the 2025 monthly revenue and MAU trends for Onmyoji? What are its current retention rates and gender demographics? What core systems and classic modes define its gameplay? What are the documented player pain points and monetization strengths? Which ASO keywords does the game target? How has its visual design and 9-year operation sustained IP vitality? (Source: DianDian Data autonomous research & visualization.)

     - Monetization/F2P: Benign resource cycle for F2P/monthly card players via continuous events/benefits.
     - Pain Points/Criticisms: Monthly events feel templated/lack innovation; late-game content feels repetitive; Soul enhancement RNG ("强歪") is a long-standing pain point; high barrier to entry for new players due to accumulated characters/system complexity.
   - *Evidence Types:* Charts/figures (revenue, MAU, retention, demographics), ASO keyword list, qualitative analysis/claims based on DianDian's autonomous research.

response_text:
This section provides foundational operational data and analytical insights for the mobile game 《阴阳师》(Onmyoji), structured to support retrieval across the following dimensions:

- **Topics & Entities:** 《阴阳师》game IP, DianDian Data (research source), core mechanics (turn-based combat, 御魂/Soul matching system), classic modes (秘闻副本, 为崽而战, 超鬼王), player segments (F2P, monthly card users, new players).
- **Dates & Timeframes:** 2025 (Jan–Oct monthly tracking), 2025 Q1–Q3 (retention measurement window), 9 years (cumulative IP operation history).
- **Metrics & Figures:** App Store monthly revenue (亿元, Jan–Oct 2025), iOS monthly active users (万人, Jan–Oct 2025), Q1–Q3 average next-day retention (~22.1%), average monthly retention (~4.8%), male player demographic share (~74.8%).
- **ASO Keywords:** 阴阳师, 式神, 痒痒鼠, 日和风, 晴明, onmyoji.
- **Claims & Operational Analysis:** 
  • *Strengths:* 和风 (Japanese-style) aesthetics and audio maintain high quality and unique cultural recognition; long-term iteration yields deep strategic gameplay; continuous events provide a sustainable resource cycle for non-paying/low-spending players.
  • *Pain Points:* RNG in Soul enhancement ("强歪"); templated monthly events with low innovation frequency; late-game content repetition; high onboarding barrier for new players due to accumulated character/system complexity.
- **Evidence Types:** Time-series charts (revenue, MAU), statistical retention/demographic metrics, ASO keyword coverage lists, qualitative operational assessment.
- **Key Retrieval Questions Answered:** What are the 2025 monthly revenue and MAU trends for Onmyoji? What are its current retention rates and gender demographics? What core systems and classic modes define its gameplay? What are the documented player pain points and monetization strengths? Which ASO keywords does the game target? How has its visual design and 9-year operation sustained IP vitality? (Source: DianDian Data autonomous research & visualization.)
